name: Ms. Harlow Does Not Know You
summary: On a return visit to Carriage 6, the nervous woman watches the investigator with the alertness of a stranger.
narrative_beats: Ms. Harlow is in the same seat. The handbag is in the same grip.
She follows you with her eyes as you come down the aisle.
'Do I know you,' she says. Not unkindly. Curiously.
You reach for what she told you two scenes ago. The shape of it is there. The words are not.
Her sleeve is stained dark, as it was before. She does not notice you noticing.
consequences_if_passed: Investigator registers the slip and may bring it up explicitly with her.
Affection with Ms. Harlow resets but is reachable again; her uncanny gate opens.
consequences_if_failed: Investigator briefly cannot recall the woman's name either.
On a 5+ SAN loss, INT check for temporary insanity; on failure, identity slip — the Keeper may have the investigator refer to themselves by a name that is not theirs for one beat.
